notes: Already linked through the Exchange Insights plugin? Bank Templates now picks that up automatically: if you haven't set a token here, the one configured in the Exchange Insights plugin on this client is used, so your account link and verified bank sync just work with zero setup. Your own Bank Templates token still wins if you set one, nothing is copied or stored twice, and clearing or revoking the token in either plugin takes effect in both immediately. Everything stays on your machine - the plugins never fetch a token from anywhere.

Bank value sync: characters linked to a (free) Exchange Insights account now send a snapshot of the bank's contents (item IDs and quantities only - no placement, notes or anything else) to exchange-insights.gg when it changes, powering bank-value tracking on the website. Nothing is ever sent for unlinked characters. Turn it off any time with 'Sync bank value' in the Exchange Insights account settings section - that stops new snapshots, and deleting your Exchange Insights account removes the stored data.
Once a linked character's bank has synced, the side panel shows your bank's live GE value at the top - bank-value tracking over time is coming to the website.

Bank Templates is free forever: every feature the plugin has stays free, with no ads and nothing paywalled. An Exchange Insights account is a separate, optional extra and never changes the free plugin.

My templates now syncs both ways with your Exchange Insights website templates. Templates you import or make in-game show up in your website My Templates, and ones you create or edit on the website appear in-game - edit on either side and both stay in step (most recent edit wins), delete on either side and it's removed from both.

You can now link this character to your free Exchange Insights account straight from Bank Templates. Click 'Link Exchange Insights account' at the top of the side panel (or tick 'Link account in browser' in settings) to approve it in your browser in one click - no token to copy - or paste an account token instead (get one at exchange-insights.gg, Account -> RuneLite plugin). The panel shows your link status once connected. No separate plugin needed; if you use the Exchange Insights plugin too, either linking method works alongside it.

Fixed website-synced templates that could show up without a name, or linger as stale duplicates after being renamed or deleted on the website (nameless cards left behind by an earlier version are now cleaned up automatically).

Community templates now have a 'Web' button next to View/Import/Report that opens that exact template on exchange-insights.gg in your browser. Templates you've shared or imported carry the same button in My templates.

We've partnered with Exchange Insights (exchange-insights.gg) to power customising your bank templates in the browser, away from the client! Head to exchange-insights.gg to browse the whole community repository and, when signed in, build and edit your own templates right on the web - there's a new 'Browse on web' button in the Browse panel. In the plugin, browsing, sharing and importing work exactly as before, nothing you need to do.

Templates you share can now show your Exchange Insights profile on the website (your icon, background and badge) if you've linked that account to Exchange Insights. It's entirely optional - nothing is shared for anonymous uploads, and you don't need an Exchange Insights account to use the plugin.

Preview: you can now import a template's Main (all-items) view, not just its numbered tabs - select the Main tab in a preview and click 'Import this tab'. Importing into an existing template replaces that template's main view (you're asked to confirm first when it already holds items); importing into a new template makes it that template's main view. As with numbered tabs, any item it brings in that already sits in another tab is moved into the main view.

Reorganise helper: fixed items being tagged with the wrong slot (and the guide showing no move for them) when a template lists the same item in two tabs. The duplicate no longer throws off the position labels for the rest of that tab, so the labels now agree with the 'Bank matches the template' state.

Layout editor: adding an item that's already in another tab now offers to move it to the tab you're editing, rather than silently refusing - an item can only live in one bank tab, so templates can no longer end up with the same item in two tabs. (Adding one that's already in the current tab just tells you so.)
Community repository: if browsing can't reach the server, the message now simply asks you to restart your client and try again.

Layout editor: the Add-item search no longer lists duplicate entries for items the game keeps several copies of (for example, three identical 'Law rune' results). Each item now appears once, matched to the real item so it applies and counts correctly.
Layout editor: the Add-item search results no longer leave a tall empty area you can scroll through when only a few items match - the list now fits the results.

Reorganise helper (step-by-step): if you drag an item into the wrong slot while sorting, the guide now sends that one item straight to its correct spot in a single insert, instead of nudging every item after it over one slot at a time to make room. Correcting a slip - or sorting a bank that is only slightly out of order - now takes far fewer drags.

Bank tabs: choose a custom icon for any tab instead of it defaulting to the tab's first item. Right-click a tab - in the layout editor or in-bank - and pick 'Set icon' (search for the item in the chatbox), or 'Reset icon' to go back to the first item. Handy when another plugin's tab-naming clashes with the default icon.

Bank view: template tabs your bank doesn't have yet (the extra tabs) now have the full right-click menu - View tab, Set icon, Collapse tab, Remove placeholders - and a hover action, matching your real tabs. 'Collapse tab' moves the tab's items into the all-items view and drops the tab; 'Remove placeholders' clears the tab's not-yet-owned items.
Bank view: template tabs your bank doesn't have yet now show their value in the bank title, matching your real tabs.
Bank view: fixed the extra template-tab buttons disappearing while certain numbered tabs were open.

Bank view: fixed being unable to withdraw items while Quest Helper's 'show quest items' bank view is open. The template now steps aside for it, the same way it already does for Bank Tags tag tabs, bank searches and Inventory Setups.
Layout editor: you can now rename a template - edit its Name at the top of the editor and click Apply. (No more being stuck with a template called 'My bank'.)

My Templates: after editing a template you've shared, the plugin offers to push the changes to your community copy. Updating only affects new imports - players who already imported it keep their copy unchanged.
My Templates: templates you imported from the community now read 'Imported' (templates you uploaded still read 'Shared by you').

Preview: import a single tab from any template - open a preview, select a tab, and click 'Import this tab' to add it to one of your templates (or a new one). Mix and match tabs from different templates without rebuilding them by hand. If an item it brings in already sits in another tab, it's moved into the imported tab (an item can only live in one tab).

Tabs: reorder a template's tabs by dragging one tab onto another to swap them, and move an item to another tab by dragging it onto that tab's button - both in the Edit window and in-bank while the template is applied.

Bank view: tabs your template defines but your bank doesn't have yet now appear as extra tab buttons after your real tabs. Click one to view it, drag items onto it, or drag a tab onto it to swap - and the + to add a new tab sits after them (up to the 9-tab limit).

Bank view: drag an item onto the + to start a new tab. Dragging a tab's last item into another tab collapses the now-empty tab (renumbering the rest) and follows the item to where it landed, so you're never stranded on a tab that no longer exists.
Layout editor: the first item you add to a freshly created tab now lands in the top-left slot, and a tab left with no items is dropped rather than kept as a blank tab.

My Templates: the 'Capture current bank' and 'New empty template' buttons now sit at the top of the tab, just under the search box, so they are easy to reach. ('New empty layout' was also renamed to 'New empty template'.)

Bank view: faded placeholder slots (items a template wants but you don't own yet) now show a '0' stack count, like the real bank's leftover placeholders, so it's clear at a glance that you own none of that item.
Counts: bank fillers (the reserved-slot item) are no longer counted toward a template's item total or the 'x / y items' owned count.

My Templates: each card now shows how many of its items you already own, as "x / y items". The count shows from your last bank visit even before you open the bank this session, then updates live as your bank changes.
My Templates: the 'Remove Template' button is now 'Disable Template', and a template card's Use/Active control is an Enable/Disable toggle - click an active template's Disable to switch it off.
My Templates: shorter, tidier cards, with the reorganise mode moved into its own description card.
A new empty layout now applies itself automatically when you create it, and you can Edit a template in My Templates without activating it.
Browse: cards now show how much of each template you own ("x / y items"), and a new 'Items owned' sort orders the results by how many of their items you already have.

Preview and Edit windows: a consistent width whatever the description, tabs on a single row by default (resize the window to wrap them), and the template's description is shown - and editable, across multiple lines, in the editor.
Layout editor: Swap mode is now a toggle button (pressed = swap, released = insert), and Apply/Cancel sit in the bottom-right corner.

Reorganise helper: colour-coding is now its own display option you can combine with Labels and Step-by-step. It tints out-of-place items and the tab buttons with their destination tab's colour so you can see where things belong at a glance.
Reorganise helper: each bank tab's colour can be customised in the plugin settings ('Reorganise tab colours'), and the main/all-items tab now has its own colour too.

Reorganise helper (labels): labels now sit in the bottom-right of each slot, clear of the stack count; items already in the right slot get a green tick; and the main tab is shown as an infinity symbol.

Reorganise helper (step-by-step): rebuilt the sort into a single forward pass - it moves each item to its tab as you reach it (creating new tabs inline along the way), then sorts each tab, without sending you back to earlier slots or looping.

Bank view: fixed bank placeholders (for example the last item of a stack you withdrew, or an item you have equipped) showing as withdrawable while a template was applied, which let you 'withdraw' a phantom copy that vanished when the bank closed. Placeholders now render correctly.
Layout editor: the Add-item search now finds every item, including untradeable ones such as Barrows gloves, Arclight and Emberlight. It previously searched only tradeable (Grand Exchange) items.
Layout editor: right-click a slot and choose 'Replace' to pick a new item from the search box and swap it into that slot.
Layout editor: the slot right-click menu now uses 'Release' (shifting the rest up to fill the gap), matching the wording you already see when right-clicking a slot over the bank.
A new plugin icon (a bank-grid design), shown on the side-panel button and in the Plugin Hub.

Bank view: fixed the green + add button covering a bank item (and blocking its withdrawal) while the bank showed an Inventory Setups view. The template now stays out of the way there, and the + always sits in an empty slot.

Community repository: fixed View (Preview) appearing to do nothing - the preview window could open off-screen when the client was maximised or fullscreen. Preview and editor windows now always open on the client's screen.
Reorganise helper: pressing Skip while the bank settings (Bank Fillers) screen is open now guides you back to the bank, instead of leaving you with no prompt.
Reorganise helper (step-by-step): the Skip button now shows on any single move step, so you can skip a move you cannot or do not want to make and the next step appears.
Reorganise helper (step-by-step): in an Inventory Setups, tag tab or search bank view it now guides you back to the normal bank view before the move steps.

Reorganise helper: items with kit or ornament variants now sort correctly - if you own two variants of one item (for example an item and its ornamented version) each keeps its own slot, while a single owned variant still fills a slot asking for a different one.
Search boxes (Browse and Add-item) now have a magnifying-glass icon, clearer easy-to-read text, and a red clear button, matching the rest of the client.
Side panel: removed the redundant title heading, and the search box is hidden on the Updates tab (nothing to search there).
Side panel: it only opens on the Updates tab the first time after an update. Once you have seen a version's notes, it opens on My Templates.
Layout editor: swap or insert items by dragging them, just like the real bank - clicking a slot no longer selects it to swap.
Layout editor: dragging to swap or move an item now refreshes only the slots that changed, instead of reloading every icon in the grid, so editing is much snappier.
Bank view: the all-items tab now shows your whole template grouped by tab (main tab first), with a divider between each tab's block of items and before any of your items that aren't in the template.
Bank view: numbered tabs show a divider between the template's items and your other items below them.
Bank view: templates bigger than your bank now render in full (the overflow slots are drawn for you), and the bank's slot counter shows the template's size, turning red when it won't fit your bank.

Bank view: better compatibility with other bank plugins (such as Inventory Setups). The layout now keeps every item on its own bank slot, so plugins that highlight or withdraw by slot pick the right items.

Bank view: fixed dragging items while a template is applied. Dragging now uses the game's own bank drag, so it no longer makes your next click withdraw the item you just dragged, and a dragged item no longer briefly looks like an empty placeholder.
Live editing: the 'Editing' label now shows in the bank's real title bar instead of a floating banner, and the item you drag no longer gets an orange box around it.
Live editing: drag an item onto the + (new tab) button to start a new template tab, up to the game's nine-tab maximum.
Live editing: dragging an item to the top or bottom edge of the bank now auto-scrolls, so you can move it across many rows without the scroll wheel.
Reorganise helper: every step now shows in the bank's title bar.

Reorganise helper: guides you to reserve slots for items you don't own yet with genuine bank fillers, showing the exact number to type in the chatbox, using the 'All' button when it fills your bank, and never asking for more than your free space. A 'Skip' button bypasses the filler step.

Reorganise helper: guides you to open the tab an item is in before dragging it, to create extra tabs when the template has more than you do, and to move spare bank fillers into the tabs that still need them.

Reorganise helper: when a Bank Tags tag tab is open it points you back to the main bank, sorts each tab on its own (no more looping), and packs items into place even when some slots couldn't be reserved.
Sharing: you can add a description (up to 500 characters) when sharing a template, shown to other players in Browse and the preview.
Side panel: the Updates tab is now pinned to the bottom of the panel and shows the full version history, newest first. The search box is cleaner and easier to read.
Community repository: Browse now shows how many templates match your search (Count: N) under the sort, and the pager reads Page X of N.

Sharing: sharing anonymously now sends nothing that identifies you. Your RuneScape name is no longer sent at all when anonymous (ownership, the per-account limit, bans and duplicate-vote guards all rely only on your account, never your name).
Side panel: fixed the Updates bullets, Browse vote arrows and pager arrows showing as empty boxes on macOS.
knownIssues: Reorganise helper: items with kit or ornament variants (such as ornament kits or cosmetic overrides) can be matched or placed incorrectly while reorganising. A fix is planned for a future update.
Layout editor: a few items (for example Barrows gloves and Emberlight) can't yet be added to a template from the item search box. A fix is planned for a future update.

notes: New layout editor: build or edit a layout without owning the items. Search for any item and drop it in, drag to rearrange, swap or insert, and mark filler/empty slots. Edit in the side panel or live over the bank.
Tab icons: the bank's tab buttons (and the editor/preview) now show each tab's first item, matching the active template.
Share anonymously: tick the box when sharing to be shown to other players as "Anonymous".
Reorganise helper redesign: choose Labels, Step-by-step, or both. Labels tag each item with its destination tab, then its row/column.
Preview now opens beside the client so the game stays clickable, with item names on hover.
Import counts are now accurate and reflect how many people currently keep a template.
Variant-aware reorg: item kits and alternate versions of an item (charged/uncharged, degraded, recoloured) count as the same item.
Fixed the reorganise helper getting stuck in a loop while dragging items around.
New: an Updates tab in the side panel shows the patch notes (like these) whenever the plugin updates.
UI polish: a slimmer side-panel scrollbar and tidier tab buttons.

Live editing: while a template is applied, drag items and placeholders around your bank to adjust it - move between tabs, and right-click a slot to Release it (the rest shift up to fill the gap). Click still withdraws as normal. The + add button sits in a scrollable bank slot, and adding an item that's already in the layout tells you which tab/row/slot it's in instead of duplicating it.
Tab icons now stay as the template's icons even inside Bank Tags tag tabs.

Editor window: dragging shows a ghost of the item you're moving, View and Edit are now one button, and there's an Apply button (closing the editor discards unsaved changes). In-bank overlay text is no longer bold.
knownIssues: Compatibility issues with the Inventory Setups plugin - to be addressed in the next update.

notes: Initial release: save, apply, share and import shareable bank layout templates.
